data_sources.name: Texas DSHS Zoonotic Cases 2020–2026 (Detailed)
data_sources.description: Lyme: 19–21 cases/year (mostly imported). Ehrlichiosis: 13–14/year. Spotted Fever Rickettsiosis: 15–18/year. Useful for a broader 'tickborne illness' red dot layer beyond just Lyme.
data_sources.notes: Hard numbers for expanding red layer to include Ehrlichia/RMSF.

data_sources.name: Texas Alpha-gal Syndrome – Growing Incidence 2026
data_sources.description: Lone Star ticks widespread across Texas. AGS cases increasing, but no mandatory reporting yet → no county-level numbers available. Good for Texas-wide purple blob popup notes.
data_sources.notes: Perfect for a Texas-wide popup when someone clicks the purple blob.

notes: The MMWR and military seroprevalence items were already integrated from prior dumps. This batch adds the specific Texas DSHS detailed table and the 2026 growing incidence health alert.
